testcase.name: test_impersonate_endpoint_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 404 assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_konekt_batch2_v337.py:71: in test_impersonate_endpoint_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 403, 422], f"Expected auth error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 404 E assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_operations_nav_items_in_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 3 operations routes to exist, got 2 assert 2 >= 3

testcase.failure: tests/test_konekt_batch2_v337.py:266: in test_operations_nav_items_in_code assert working_routes >= 3, f"Expected at least 3 operations routes to exist, got {working_routes}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 3 operations routes to exist, got 2 E assert 2 >= 3
